notes: Agent self-reports task progress via an in-band hidden marker (irrlicht-eta) driven by an instruction-file rule. Vibe honors AGENTS.md at BOTH user ($VIBE_HOME/AGENTS.md) and project level (system_prompt.py:342-388, gated on include_project_context, injected verbatim with NO HTML-comment stripping), so a user can seed the task-eta marker rule → agent=yes. The vibe parser (parser.go:57-66) scans the FULL assistant content via tailer.ScanTaskEstimate/ScanTaskSummary and sets ev.TaskEstimate/ev.TaskSummary, which feed the SAME adapter-agnostic SessionMetrics.TaskEstimate {total_rounds,completed_rounds,updated_at} + ForecastTaskCompletion (elapsed/completed, burns down) + working-only presentation pipeline claudecode uses → daemon=full by construction. The PHASE DSL asserts only the user-observable lifecycle arc (multi-turn ready→working→ready to a ready finish); the estimate-content invariants (completed_rounds present + non-decreasing + reaching total; updated_at advancing; ETA present once ≥1 round + burning down; fields present only while working / absent at ready) live in acceptance_criteria + recipe verify[]. Driver gap: the scaffolded mistral-vibe driver stubs wait_turn (DRIVE_ELICITS='send slash sleep') — record ports SEAM 2 before driving. Emission is model-discretion; observations.model pinned to the default mistral-medium-3.5 (record corrects on drift).

text: Session appears in ready (first phase anchored UNPINNED to start; vibe is a single-birth adapter — a stable transcript/session id from launch)
First prompt (plan 5 phases, emit 0/5 then advance to 1/5) drives ready → working; the first marker is emitted and task_estimate.total_rounds=5 appears on metrics
Turn 1 completes back to ready; completed_rounds=1 (the first reported round) — task_completion_eta now projectable
Phase-2 prompt drives ready → working; marker advances toward 2/5 (completed_rounds non-decreasing, updated_at advances)
Turn 2 completes back to ready; ETA after this marker ≤ ETA after turn 1 (burns down)
Phase-3 prompt drives ready → working; marker advances toward 3/5
Phase-4 prompt drives ready → working; marker advances toward 4/5
Final phase-5 prompt drives ready → working; marker reaches 5/5 (completed_rounds == total_rounds by the final working turn)
Final turn completes working → ready; final session state is ready; the ≥12s trailing idle captures the post-turn settle, after which the client suppresses the ETA chip (present only while working)
